description: Create a content slide with a left-side multi-series line chart on sex ratio at birth by country from 1970 to 2017 and a right sidebar text commentary, under the headline about population pyramid symmetry and gender ratio imbalances.

header.headline: Broadly symmetrical population pyramids only tell half the story – Some larger countries face gender ratio imbalances for some time to come
header.sub: Sex ratio at birth (SRB), selected countries showing SRB imbalance, 1970 to 2017

sidebar.body: Selected countries show sustained sex ratio at birth imbalances over time, indicating that symmetrical population pyramids can mask underlying gender distortions. Larger countries in particular may continue to face these imbalances for some time to come.
